summary: P1 Caching Layer Validation - Cache Health Dashboard fully tested. All 8 backend API endpoints pass (33 pytest tests). Frontend dashboard loads correctly with all KPI cards, Redis/Mongo health cards, fallback test functionality, TTL configuration, and metrics reset working properly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cache Health Dashboard (P1 Caching Layer) fully operational. Redis is unavailable in preview environment (expected) - system gracefully falls back to MongoDB. All 8 cache-health API endpoints tested and passing. Frontend dashboard at /app/admin/cache-health shows degraded status (expected due to no Redis), but MongoDB L2 fallback is working correctly.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/admin/cache-health/overview: PASS - Returns status, summary metrics, Redis/Mongo health, TTL config
backend_endpoints.GET /api/admin/cache-health/metrics: PASS - Returns detailed metrics snapshot with counters, hit_rate, latency
backend_endpoints.GET /api/admin/cache-health/ttl-config: PASS - Returns 20 categories and 6 supplier overrides
backend_endpoints.GET /api/admin/cache-health/redis/health: PASS - Returns error status (expected - no Redis in preview)
backend_endpoints.GET /api/admin/cache-health/mongo/health: PASS - Returns l2_cache and app_cache stats
backend_endpoints.POST /api/admin/cache-health/test-fallba: PASS - Both normal and Redis Down simulation work correctly
backend_endpoints.POST /api/admin/cache-health/reset-metri: PASS - Resets all counters to empty

frontend_components.KPI cards: PASS - Hit Rate, Miss Rate, Fallback, Stale Serve, Inv. OK, Inv. Fail all visible
frontend_components.Redis L1 health card: PASS - Shows Error status with reason (expected)
frontend_components.MongoDB L2 health card: PASS - Shows Healthy status with entry counts
frontend_components.Fallback Test section: PASS - Both Normal Test and Redis Down buttons work
frontend_components.TTL Configuration section: PASS - Expands to show category/TTL table
frontend_components.Navigation entry: PASS - Cache Health visible in sidebar navigation

mocked_apis.note: Redis is genuinely unavailable in preview environment. This is expected behavior, not a mock.
